title: October 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 28''' is the 301st day of the year (302nd in leap years), with 64 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Charles Lippincott]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Paul Warren]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Gwendoline Christie]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Star Wars'' (1977) 43]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 1]]'' published.
*1998 – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 4]] published.
*1998 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]] published.
*2004 – ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 53]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Reunion II|''Star Wars'' Reunion II]] concludes in [[Wikipedia:Paris|Paris]], [[Wikipedia:France|France]].
*[[2008]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' paperback published.
*[[2009]] – [[Legacy (2006) 41|''Legacy'' (2006) 41]] published.
*2009 – ''[[Jaws of the Sarlacc]]'' tenth and final adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy Comic 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Comic'' 1]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Darkness on Umbara]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2014]] – ''[[William Shakespeare's Star Wars Trilogy: The Royal Imperial Boxed Set]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Razor's Edge]]'' paperback published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Costumes: The Original Trilogy]]'' released.
*2014 – [[Star Wars: Legacy Volume II Book 4—Empire of One|''Star Wars: Legacy'' Volume II Book 4—''Empire of One'']] published
*2014 – ''[[Bedtime on Concordia]]'' released.
*[[2015]] – "[[Always Two There Are]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2015 – [[Chewbacca (2015) 2|''Chewbacca'' (2015) 2]] published.
*2015 – [[Kanan 7|''Kanan'' 7]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 11|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 11]] published in Germany.
*[[2018]] – "[[The High Tower]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 5|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 5]] published.
*2020 – "[[Obi-Wan Kenobi (Galaxy of Adventures)|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]" premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2021]] – "[[Wampa (episode)|Wampa]]" premieres on the Star Wars Kids YouTube channel.
*2021 – "[[Tooka (episode)|Tooka]]" premieres on the Star Wars Kids YouTube channel.
*2021 – General bookings for [[Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser|''Star Wars'': Galactic Starcruiser]] open.
*[[2025]] – [[The Acolyte: The Crystal Crown (audiobook)|''The Acolyte: The Crystal Crown'' audiobook]] released.
<noinclude>
